\PuzzleChapterIntro{$\Omega\uparrow\oplus$}{$\exists!\ \uparrow\ \oplus\ \vdash$}{$\mathcal{L}_{sym} \models \mathbb{B} \land (\uparrow,\oplus) \Rightarrow \exists! \nu$}

\Lore{
$\tau=22{:}20,\ \Phi=\varnothing.\qquad
S=\{1,2,3,4\}.\qquad
\exists i\in S\bigl(L(i)\land \forall j\in S\,(j\ne i\to \neg L(j))\bigr),\qquad
\exists i\in S\bigl(G(i)\land \forall j\in S\,(j\ne i\to \neg G(j))\bigr).\\
\forall i\in S\ \forall k\in\{1,2,3\}:\ (T(i)\to \sigma_{i,k})\land(L(i)\to \neg\sigma_{i,k}).
\qquad \kappa,\lambda,\Delta.$
}
\Problem

\[
S=\{1,2,3,4\}.
\]

\[
T(i):=L(i)\uparrow L(i).
\qquad
p\uparrow q := \neg(p\land q).
\qquad
p\oplus q := (p\lor q)\land\neg(p\land q).
\]

\[
(\exists i\in S\,L(i))\land(\forall a\in S\,\forall b\in S:\ (a\neq b)\to\neg(L(a)\land L(b))).
\]
\[
(\exists i\in S\,G(i))\land(\forall a\in S\,\forall b\in S:\ (a\neq b)\to\neg(G(a)\land G(b))).
\]
\[
\forall i\in S\ \forall k\in\{1,2,3\}:\ (T(i)\to\sigma_{i,k})\land(L(i)\to\neg\sigma_{i,k}).
\]

\[
\begin{array}{rcl}
\sigma_{1,1}&:=&(L(3)\oplus G(4))\uparrow(L(3)\oplus G(4))\\
\sigma_{1,2}&:=&L(2)\uparrow G(2)\\
\sigma_{1,3}&:=&L(4)\uparrow (G(1)\uparrow G(1))\\[2pt]
\sigma_{2,1}&:=&L(1)\oplus G(4)\\
\sigma_{2,2}&:=&G(1)\uparrow (L(3)\uparrow L(3))\\
\sigma_{2,3}&:=&L(3)\uparrow G(2)\\[2pt]
\sigma_{3,1}&:=&G(4)\uparrow G(4)\\
\sigma_{3,2}&:=&L(1)\oplus L(2)\\
\sigma_{3,3}&:=&G(4)\oplus L(3)\\[2pt]
\sigma_{4,1}&:=&L(3)\uparrow G(2)\\
\sigma_{4,2}&:=&(G(4)\oplus(G(1)\uparrow G(1)))\uparrow(G(4)\oplus(G(1)\uparrow G(1)))\\
\sigma_{4,3}&:=&L(3)\uparrow G(1)
\end{array}
\]

\VaultDirective{$i^\star:=\iota i\in S\;G(i)$. $i^\star$?.}

\SolutionPage

\[
\forall a\in S\,\forall b\in S:\ (a\neq b)\to\neg(L(a)\land L(b)).
\qquad
\forall a\in S\,\forall b\in S:\ (a\neq b)\to\neg(G(a)\land G(b)).
\]

\[
\boxed{L(1)}
\Rightarrow \neg\sigma_{1,2}
\Rightarrow \neg(L(2)\uparrow G(2))
\Rightarrow (L(2)\land G(2))
\Rightarrow (L(1)\land L(2))
\Rightarrow \bot.
\]

\[
\boxed{L(2)}
\Rightarrow \neg\sigma_{2,2}
\Rightarrow \neg\bigl(G(1)\uparrow(L(3)\uparrow L(3))\bigr)
\Rightarrow \bigl(G(1)\land(L(3)\uparrow L(3))\bigr).
\]
\[
L(2)\Rightarrow T(1)\land T(3)
\Rightarrow \sigma_{1,1}\land \sigma_{3,3}.
\]
\[
\sigma_{1,1}\land (L(3)\uparrow L(3)) \Rightarrow (G(4)\uparrow G(4)),
\qquad
\sigma_{3,3}\land (L(3)\uparrow L(3)) \Rightarrow G(4),
\]
\[
\Rightarrow \bot.
\]

\[
\boxed{L(4)}
\Rightarrow \neg\sigma_{4,1}
\Rightarrow \neg(L(3)\uparrow G(2))
\Rightarrow (L(3)\land G(2))
\Rightarrow (L(3)\land L(4))
\Rightarrow \bot.
\]

\[
\Rightarrow L(3).
\]
\[
L(3)\Rightarrow \neg\sigma_{3,1}
\Rightarrow \neg(G(4)\uparrow G(4))
\Rightarrow G(4).
\]
\[
\forall a\in S\,\forall b\in S:\ (a\neq b)\to\neg(G(a)\land G(b))
\Rightarrow i^\star=4.
\]

\FinalAnswer{4}

\NextPage
